abilities.effect: When you turn the *herald’s ring* around your finger three times in either direction, you gain the ability to easily project your voice up to 200 feet without raising the volume of speech, reaching your audience in most venues, including arenas. This effect lasts up to 2 hours.
abilities.name: Activate

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

abilities.critical_failure: None of the damage is reflected, but the *herald’s ring* does absorb enough energy so that you can activate it again today.
abilities.critical_success: All of the damage is reflected back on its source.
abilities.effect: You use the *herald’s ring* to reflect a portion of the sonic damage back at its source by attempting to counteract the effect. The ring has a counteract modifier of +23.
abilities.failure: Half of the damage is reflected back at the source, and you take the rest of the damage.
abilities.name: Activate
abilities.success: Half of the damage is reflected back at its source, and the other half is negated.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

abilities.trigger: You take sonic damage from a spell or effect

stat_block.text: Adorned with golden herald horns, this green ring both enhances a performer’s vocal projection and provides partial protection against sonic attacks.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Invested
traits.text: A character can invest only 10 magical items that have the invested trait. None of the magical effects of the item apply if the character hasn’t invested it, nor can it be activated, though the character still gains any normal benefits from wearing the physical item (like a hat keeping rain off their head).

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.
